pi_items.verified_value: Sierra Leone has implemented case-based disease surveillance using DHIS2 Tracker, including TB case tracking
pi_items.source: Web search results indicate: (1) Sierra Leone Ministry of Health developed eCBDS (Case-Based Diseases Surveillance) on DHIS2 platform since 2018; (2) MDR-TB surveillance system implemented using DHIS2; (3) DHIS2 official documentation references TB Case Surveillance Program (Tracker) used in countries including Sierra Leone

pi_items.verified_value: Western Area Urban is a district-level org unit configured in Sierra Leone DHIS2
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed: (1) Western Area Urban is administrative district of Sierra Leone; (2) DHIS2 was piloted in multiple districts including Western Area; (3) Health facility surveillance data (including HIV and TB) evaluated in Western Area Urban district (2022 study)

privileged_info_summary: The DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database (v2.40) is official demo data from the DHIS2 project, downloaded from https://databases.dhis2.org/. The database contains real TB case surveillance tracking data for Sierra Leone, including Western Area Urban district (a real administrative district and DHIS2 implementation site). The task requires exporting TB programme patient data from the Tracker module and creating a visualization of TB notifications for 2022. Two file exports are expected (working list + visualization data). Sierra Leone has implemented case-based disease surveillance for TB using DHIS2 Tracker since 2018, making the task scenario aligned with real-world health information system operations.
